offer: For accounting firm partners processing 10-20 clients, inefficient audit trails cause compliance delays. We automate compliance reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting processes.
problem: Difficulty in maintaining accurate audit trails and generating timely compliance reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firm partners
Indie Hackers posts on compliance reporting workflows
DM outreach to accounting firm partners with demo video
Community forums where accounting partners share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry and report generation for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing client data
